# Goal: observability

**Compiler behavior, benchmark results, and conformance history are easy to inspect and compare.**

- **Status**: Activatable
- **Track**: Supporting track
- **Target**: Better reports, benchmark visibility, support matrices, and historical comparisons.
- **Dependencies**: None

## Why

Without clear observability, regressions and wins are hard to trust. Historical
comparisons and benchmark visibility help separate real progress from noise.

## Issues

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:GOAL-ISSUES-START -->

| # | Title | Sprint | Status | Priority |
|---|-------|--------|--------|----------|
| **880** | Dashboard: issue flow visualization — time from ready to done per issue |  | ready | low |
| **881** | Dashboard: real-time resource monitoring — memory graphs, agent widgets, test progress |  | ready | high |
| **1011** | Offline-first benchmarks with Playwright DOM measurement and Run Live button |  | ready | medium |

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:GOAL-ISSUES-END -->

## Success criteria

- Historical conformance changes are reproducible and comparable
- Benchmarks and support matrices are easy to inspect
- Reporting surfaces the right information for triage and communication
